hero.subtitle: I build end-to-end applications with a focus on user experience, clean code, well-structured APIs, and systems designed to grow.

about.name: João Santos
about.paragraph1: I’m a full-stack developer currently completing my degree in Systems Analysis and Development, with experience across the entire software development lifecycle. My work spans from gathering requirements and understanding business needs to system design, logic implementation, interface design, development, testing, deployment, and user training support.
about.paragraph2: I focus on building complete, scalable, and secure applications, always aiming to combine technical excellence with a modern and intuitive user experience.
about.stackDescription: Technologies and tools I have already worked with throughout my projects.
about.achievementsDescription: Certifications and achievements that are part of my journey.
